response.justification: James Smith is a capable full-stack developer with 20 years of broad hands-on engineering experience, but he falls well short of the director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. His AI involvement is limited to a single recent position (April 2025–present) contributing to MCP tooling and agentic workflows, with no demonstrated history of building AI products or platforms at scale. He holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his career — while technically diverse — shows no evidence of enterprise advisory work, cloud platform strategy, or recognized external AI thought leadership. The role requires someone who can define cloud and AI direction and advise strategic customers at an executive level; this candidate's track record is that of a skilled senior/staff hands-on IC.
strengths: 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, distributed systems, and embedded hardware demonstrates genuine technical versatility
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (founder, ongoing) and early startup contributions at WatchUp shows product ownership and initiative beyond pure execution
Recent work at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, indicating active engagement with emerging agentic AI tooling
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms shipped at scale prior to 2025 and no publications, talks, or recognized industry standing in AI
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; education is a BS in Computer Science and a BA in Fine Arts, both at undergraduate level

Current title and career trajectory (Senior Software Developer) do not reflect the director-level strategic leadership, enterprise customer advisory, or cloud platform expertise the role explicitly requires

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and track record
No director-level strategic or advisory experience
